messages.body: Hey Karina, we’ll soon roll out an update that allows your Win Agent to make appointments more seamlessly on Square — saving you even more time.  To enable this, Zoca just needs a few extra permissions. You can grant the…
Telephone number, 831-677-8863, can't take your call now. At the tone, please record your message. When you've finished recording, simply hang up or press pound.
Hey Karina,    Just checking in about the finance offer we shared — wanted to see if you’d like to move forward before it expires.    — Leen from Zoca

Subject: How’s your experience with ZOCA?\n\nBody: Hi Karina, I'm Gurleen here from Client Experience at Zoca. My role is to make sure you feel supported. We know we're still learning and growing, but your experi…

Hey  Karina,    This is Leen from Zoca.     Just wanted to check in—looks like we haven’t received your payment for October yet.     Here is the link for the payment:  https://zoca.chargebee.com/pages/v3/7VAcuY0W7E0hLy5I…
